name: agentic-board
description: Run coding agents off your real GitHub Projects board — quota-aware, review-gated orchestration, not another local Kanban. A general platform; BI GitOps is a future module.

plugins.name: agentic-board
plugins.description: Run coding agents off your real GitHub Projects board — a quota-aware, review-gated coordinator, not another local Kanban. Cross-account board & issue governance, parallel /board work sessions (one worktree + agent per issue), a multi-CLI fleet, session handoff (save/resume context), a skills-ops lifecycle module, a sanitized improvement-feedback flow, and a private-content guard. BI GitOps is a future module.

plugins.name: agentic-bi-ops
plugins.description: DEPRECATED alias — renamed to agentic-board. Points to the same plugin so existing `agentic-bi-ops` installs keep updating. Install the new name: agentic-board.
